title: eugenia limbata
intro: Eugenia limbata, also known as the Brazilian guava or pitomba, is a tropical evergreen tree native to Brazil. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. Eugenia limbata has been associated with several health benefits, including lowering cholesterol levels, reducing blood pressure, and acting as an antioxidant. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin problems.
